query:
SELECT
    address,
    is_safe,
    is_safe_owner,
    is_gpay_wallet,
    is_ga_user,
    controls_gpay_wallet,
    is_circles_avatar,
    circles_avatar_type,
    is_circles_wrapper,
    is_lp_provider,
    pool_protocol,
    is_pool,
    is_lending_user,
    is_validator_depositor,
    has_dune_label,
    dune_project
  FROM dbt.int_execution_address_roles_current
  WHERE 1 = 1
    /*__FILTER_CONDITIONS__*/
